content.json:
# Cisco Meraki — Network Anomaly Hunting
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1046 Network Service Discovery · T1071 Application Layer Protocol · T1190 Exploit Public-Facing Application · TA0011 Command & Control

**Data source:** `CommonSecurityLog` (Meraki forwarded as CEF/Syslog via AMA). If your Meraki connector populates different field names, adjust the queries.

> Tune thresholds against your own baseline before alerting.

content.query: CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor has 'Cisco' or DeviceProduct has 'Meraki' | extend Bytes=todouble(coalesce(SentBytes,'0'))+todouble(coalesce(ReceivedBytes,'0')) | summarize TotalBytes=sum(Bytes) by SourceIP, DestinationIP, DestinationPort | top 50 by TotalBytes desc
content.title: Top talkers by bytes

content.query: CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor has 'Cisco' or DeviceProduct has 'Meraki' | summarize DistinctPorts=dcount(DestinationPort), Ports=make_set(DestinationPort,50) by SourceIP, DestinationIP | where DistinctPorts > 20 | sort by DistinctPorts desc
content.title: Possible port scan (>20 distinct destination ports) — T1046

content.query: CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor has 'Cisco' or DeviceProduct has 'Meraki' | where tolower(DeviceAction) in ('deny','blocked','drop','denied') | summarize Denied=count() by bin(TimeGenerated,1h), SourceIP | render timechart
content.title: Denied flows over time

content.query: CommonSecurityLog | where DeviceVendor has 'Cisco' or DeviceProduct has 'Meraki' | where ipv4_is_private(DestinationIP) == false | summarize Connections=count(), Bytes=sum(todouble(coalesce(SentBytes,'0'))) by DestinationIP | top 25 by Bytes desc
content.title: Outbound to external IPs (possible C2 / exfil) — T1071/TA0011
